confidence.explanation: All 5 core ACs verified (API + UI). UV-3 asset scan, UV-5 accessibility scan, and UV-6 snapshot drift were not executed (no axe-core or baseline available headlessly). Core deduction: 0. UV gap deduction: -18 (3 UV TCs skipped). Invoice line items render correctly.

test_cases.title: GET /so/invoice returns location.email field
test_cases.note: location.email = 'info@totemlodge.com' present in GET /so/invoice?booking_id=8 response. HTTP 200.

test_cases.title: GET /so/invoice returns location.website field
test_cases.note: location.website = 'www.totemlodge.com' present in GET /so/invoice?booking_id=8 response. HTTP 200.

test_cases.title: Existing location fields remain present and unaffected
test_cases.note: All 11 location fields present: name, address_line1, address_line2, city, state_prov, country, postal_zip, phone_number, mobile_number, email (new), website (new). No regression.

test_cases.title: Invoice render page displays location email
test_cases.note: Invoice Preview dialog shows 'info@totemlodge.com' in location header block. Rendered via /reservation/BK_J755DICT + Print Invoice button.

test_cases.title: Invoice render page displays location website
test_cases.note: Invoice Preview dialog shows 'www.totemlodge.com' in location header block, appearing as first line after hotel name.

test_cases.title: Console Error Scan
test_cases.note: 2 console errors recorded. Both allowlisted: (1) Cognito favicon 404 (third-party, expected), (2) booking/search 400 (QA probe artifact, not app behavior). All app-initiated requests returned 200.

test_cases.title: Network Error Scan
test_cases.note: All 4 app API requests returned 200: GET /user/profile, POST /booking/search, GET /so/invoice?booking_id=8, POST /inventory/search. No non-2xx from xin-api-np.wbee.ca.

test_cases.title: Broken Asset Scan
test_cases.note: Skipped: no automated asset HEAD-check tooling available in headless run. No broken images observed visually in screenshots.

test_cases.title: Document Lifecycle Smoke
test_cases.note: Exempt: API-only backend ticket. No CMS document create/edit/publish workflow in scope. See exemption.md.

test_cases.title: Accessibility Scan
test_cases.note: Skipped: axe-core not available in this headless Playwright MCP context. No critical a11y regressions observed.

test_cases.title: Snapshot Drift Check
test_cases.note: Skipped: no baseline-stable run exists for INV-661. Cannot diff without a baseline.
